root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) as memname ,(select member_status_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status where member_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code)as member_status ,(select deposit_name from sc_dep_m_rule where deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code)as deposit_type_name ,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ,(select ref_contract_no from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = sc_dep_m_creditor.loan_type_coll)as loan_type_coll ,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock
,coalesce( ( select max( begining_of_contract ) from sc_lon_m_contract where 1=1 and loan_type in( '20' ,'30' ) and membership_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) , null ) as loan_begining_of_contract
,coalesce( ( select sum( principal_balance ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where 1=1 and loan_type in( '20' ,'30' ) and principal_balance > 0 and membership_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) , 0) as loan_bal ,PKA_LON_REQFEE.fp_tge_calc_replace_share_return( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no , sc_dep_m_creditor.loan_type_coll ) as return_dep from sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status = '0' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code <> '60' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0
and loan_type_coll in ( select loan_type from sc_lon_m_rule_fee where loan_fee_type = '15') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no
